Vendored OCRmyPDF Fixture Notes
===============================

This directory contains small expected-text fixtures copied from the public
OCRmyPDF repository:

https://github.com/ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF

Vendored files:

- `tests/resources/linn.txt`
- `README.resources.rst`

The OCR sample PDFs in `examples/sample-documents.tsv` are downloaded from the
same upstream OCRmyPDF `tests/resources` directory. The vendored text fixture is
used only for smoke-test correctness checks; the PDF samples themselves are not
committed here.
